meta.title: Error 404
meta.description: Displays an error message for 404 pages with heading, description, and CTA buttons

requiredPatterns.usage: Empty state handling for text group and button group
Inline-editable heading (h1) and description (p) with no formats allowed
Render button array with primary/secondary/tertiary variations
PHP heading gets id for accessibility landmark

qualityChecklist: block.json has multiple: false and category: takt-theme-template
Error404.tsx exports Edit component with shouldDisplay
Error404.php renders frontend with esc_html and theme_block_region_id
TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure
Button filtering logic identical in TSX and PHP

attributes.name: buttons
attributes.description: CTA buttons (up to 3). Only buttons with url or postId render on frontend.

section.notes: Site uses --header-height (not --header-main-height). mt-(--header-height) offsets below fixed header.

heading.notes: Site has no text-display utility. text-header-0 is the largest (4rem mobile, 5.25rem desktop) using Anton font. Uses text-accent instead of text-room-chilli — accent defaults to neon-green but adapts to page color scheme.

buttonGroup.classes: relative flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-4
buttonGroup.condition: any button has url or postId

mobile.behavior: Single column centered layout. text-header-0 at 4rem (64px). Buttons stack vertically via flex-wrap. Generous vertical padding (pt-20 pb-40) provides visual weight.

tablet.behavior: Same as mobile but text-header-0 scales up to ~5.25rem per typography responsive scale. Buttons may sit side-by-side if space allows.

desktop.behavior: Same centered layout. Buttons display inline via flex-wrap. No layout changes needed — single column design works at all sizes.

emptyState.field: shouldDisplay() controls editor empty state. Text group shows when heading or description has content. Button group shows when any button has url or postId.

editorBehavior.blockNaming: Not needed — multiple: false means only one instance

heading.ariaLabel: None needed — h1 provides implicit landmark

buttons.opensInNewTab: sr-only text added for new tab links

decisions.decision: Use text-header-0 instead of text-display (which doesn't exist in this theme)
decisions.evidence: error-404.md adaptation note #3: 'text-display should map to the site's typography scale'. text-header-0 is the largest heading utility (4rem/5.25rem) with Anton font.

decisions.decision: Use text-accent instead of a hardcoded color like text-room-chilli
decisions.evidence: error-404.md adaptation note #2: 'Replace text-room-chilli with the site's accent/brand color class'. The site uses a dynamic accent color system (--accent-color) with text-accent utility, which adapts per color scheme.
body.css defines --header-height as the site's header height variable. No --header-main-height exists.

decisions.decision: Remove font-bold from heading — Anton headings use font-weight 400 per theme typography
decisions.evidence: typography.css sets --text-header-0--font-weight: 400 and base styles apply font-normal to all headings. text-header-0 utility already includes the correct weight. Adding font-bold would conflict.

decisions.decision: Keep pt-20 pb-40 spacing from block-type doc
decisions.evidence: error-404.md specifies pt-20 pb-40 for generous vertical padding. This aligns with the site's spacing scale.

decisions.decision: Remove shadow-sm from container — block-type doc TSX example includes it but layout structure does not
decisions.evidence: The layout structure in section 2 shows no shadow. The TSX example adds shadow-sm to the container div, likely as an editor affordance. Omitting for cleaner output.

variations.demoDescription: Only heading provided. Tests empty state handling for description and buttons.
Heading, description, and all three button variations populated with realistic content.

attributes.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
attributes.buttons: 3 buttons: primary (Go to Homepage), secondary (Contact Us), tertiary (Browse Articles)

variations.demoDescription: Excessive text length to test overflow and truncation behavior.

attributes.heading: 404 - This Page Cannot Be Found Anywhere On Our Entire Website

variations.demoDescription: Tests rendering with only one button (primary). Secondary and tertiary have no URL.
Tests block with heading and description but no buttons configured.

attributes.description: The page you requested could not be found.

variations.demoTitle: Heading Only - No Description, No Buttons
variations.demoDescription: Minimal possible state. Only heading provided, all optional fields empty.
